title: Smoky Tarte Tatin
description: A creative twist on the classic French dessert, featuring a smoky flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Chickpeas
ingredients.amount: 1 can (14.5 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed

instructions: In a large skillet, melt the smoked butter over medium heat.
Add the granulated sugar and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves.
Add the cinnamon and vanilla extract, and cook for 1 minute.
Arrange the Tarte Tatin cake in the skillet, and pour the sugar mixture over the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cake is golden brown and the sugar is caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Transfer the cake to a serving plate, and drizzle with heavy cream.
Garnish with chickpeas and serve immediately.
